title: Pastel'd
description: A tweaks pack for people who love pastel and Vanilla.
body:
### Pastel'd 1.8, a tweaks pack
a tweaks pack aiming to make old textures brighter and nicer.
- Pastel Hearts
- Dark UI
- Smoother hunger bar
- more!


update very soon.

1.20 will be developed in the future with newer textures in mind.
